mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_step_instance ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, job_task_id, step_code, step_type, step_status, retry_count, related_file_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, version, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{jobPartitionId}, #{jobTaskId}, #{stepCode}, #{stepType}, #{stepStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{relatedFileId}, #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorKey}, #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{version}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )

insert into batch.job_step_instance ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, job_task_id, step_code, step_type, step_status, retry_count, related_file_id, result_summary, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, version, started_at, finished_at ) values
( #{e.tenantId}, #{e.jobInstanceId}, #{e.jobPartitionId}, #{e.jobTaskId}, #{e.stepCode}, #{e.stepType}, #{e.stepStatus}, #{e.retryCount}, #{e.relatedFileId}, #{e.resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{e.errorCode}, #{e.errorMessage}, #{e.errorKey}, #{e.errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{e.version}, #{e.startedAt}, #{e.finishedAt} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_step_instance set step_status = #{stepStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, related_file_id = coalesce(#{relatedFileId}, related_file_id), result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}

update batch.job_step_instance set step_status = #{readyStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, result_summary = null, error_code = null, error_message = null, error_key = null, error_args = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_task_id = #{jobTaskId}
